title: Call to Prayer: Adhan in Minecraft
description: Call to Prayer: Adhan in Minecraft adds authentic Adhan recordings from cities worldwide, naturally generating minarets, and Minaret Speaker Blocks that automatically play the Adhan at real-world prayer times.
body:
# Call to Prayer: Adhan in Minecraft

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CkpNoQPPOfg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Call to Prayer: Adhan in Minecraft brings the **Islamic Call to Prayer (Adhan) into Minecraft**, creating an immersive experience with authentic **Adhan sounds from different cities, functional Adhan blocks, and naturally generating minaret structures.**  

## 🔊 Main Features  

### 🎵 Adhan Music Discs  
- Features **Adhan recordings from various cities worldwide**.  
- Can be played in a **jukebox** like standard Minecraft music discs.  

### 📢 Adhan Sound Blocks  
- Plays the **Adhan automatically** at real-world prayer times based on the player's computer time.  
- **100-block radius** for the sound effect.  
- The prayer calls occur at the following times (**24-hour format**):  
  - **Fajr** – 05:00 *(Before sunrise)*  
  - **Dhuhr** – 12:30 *(Midday)*  
  - **Asr** – 15:45 *(Afternoon)*  
  - **Maghrib** – 18:15 *(Sunset)*  
  - **Isha** – 20:00 *(Nighttime)*  
- *(It wasn't easy collecting and editing audio from different Adhans, so some cities may only have either a Fajr or non-Fajr version.)*  

### 🌍 Cities with Adhan Recordings  
📍 **Mecca 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia**  
📍 **Medina 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia**  
📍 **Cairo 🇪🇬 Egypt**  
📍 **Istanbul 🇹🇷 Turkey**  
📍 **Jerusalem 🇵🇸 Palestine**  
📍 **Ramallah 🇵🇸 Palestine**  
📍 **Fez 🇲🇦 Morocco**  
📍 **Delhi 🇮🇳 India**  
📍 **Dhaka 🇧🇩 Bangladesh**  
📍 **Jakarta 🇮🇩 Indonesia**  
📍 **Kuala Lumpur 🇲🇾 Malaysia**  
📍 **Sarajevo 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina**  
📍 **London 🇬🇧 United Kingdom**  
📍 **Amsterdam 🇳🇱 Netherlands**  
📍 **Toronto 🇨🇦 Canada**  
📍 **New York 🇺🇸 United States**  
📍 **Akko 🇮🇱 Israel**  
📍 **Baghdad 🇮🇶 Iraq**  
📍 **Beirut 🇱🇧 Lebanon**  
📍 **Damascus 🇸🇾 Syria**  
📍 **Addis Ababa 🇪🇹 Ethiopia**  

*(More cities may be added later!)*  

## 🕌 Minaret Structures  
- **Three types of minarets** generate naturally: **Jeljuk, Mughal, and Tihurid**.  
- Each minaret contains **one easy loot chest & one hidden loot chest**.  

### 📦 Minaret Loot Chests  
- 💿 **Adhan Music Discs**  
- 💎 **Emeralds**  
- 🏆 **Gold Nuggets / Ingots / Blocks**  
- ⚒️ **Iron Nuggets / Ingots / Blocks**  
- 💠 **Diamonds** *(rare but possible!)*  
- 🔵 **Lapis Lazuli**  
- 🟫 **Quartz**  
- 🟠 **Copper Ingots / Blocks**  

## 🔊 Minaret Speaker Block  
- **Generated at the top of minarets** or can be **crafted manually**.  
- **Automatically plays the Adhan** at real-world prayer times when placed.  
- **Functions identically to the Adhan Sound Blocks**, providing an immersive experience.  

---  

This mod **adds cultural and spiritual depth** to Minecraft, allowing players to experience the beauty of the Adhan while exploring or building in their world.
